ddls:
CREATE TABLE "citizens" (
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the citizen */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to workclasses table */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to educations table */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to marital_statuses table */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to occupations table */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to relationships table */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to races table */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to genders table */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the citizen */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the citizen */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the citizen */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the citizen */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country of birth of the citizen */,
  "immigration_status" TEXT /* Immigration status of the citizen */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the citizen */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language spoken by the citizen */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the citizen */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to data_sources table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizens_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of the education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_category" TEXT /* Category of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "ethnic_group" TEXT /* Ethnic group of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
